philippines.title: Mandaue City police: Fewer crimes reported in January-May 2026
philippines.description:
MANDAUE CITY, Cebu — The Mandaue City Police Office (MCPO) reported a decline in crime incidents from January to May 2026. During his appearance before the Mandaue City Council on Monday, May 18, MCPO Director Police Colonel Cirilo Acosta Jr., received a commendation for the MCPO’s being recognized as the Best City Police Office in 2025. The Police Regional Office in Central Visayas gave the recognition during the 35th Philippine National Police Day celebration on February 23, 2026 at Camp Sergio Osmeña Sr. in Cebu City. What the Mandaue City police watched Acosta received the commendation before presenting the peace […]...
Keep on reading: Mandaue City police: Fewer crimes reported in January-May 2026

philippines.title: Sara Duterte's lawyer: 'We will comply with impeachment court'
philippines.description:
Vice President Sara Duterte's defense team said they would respond accordingly after the Senate, sitting as an impeachment court, ordered the issuance of a writ of summons directing her to answer the Articles of Impeachment within 10 calendar days....
Keep on reading: Sara Duterte's lawyer: 'We will comply with impeachment court'

philippines.title: What BGYO’s Gelo, Vu Thao My learned from each other after fiery collab
philippines.description:
BGYO’s Gelo and Vietnamese singer Vũ Thảo My might’ve come from different worlds, but their fiery chemistry shone through in “Zealous” — and both hoping they learned something new from each other. “I think I learned a lot from Gelo throughout the process, even if [our time together] was short,” My said when she and the P-pop idol were asked about what they hope to learn from the other. “The thing I hope he learns from me is to be open to collaborating with different artists from other countries. Everyone should do that.” For his part, Gelo hopes the Vietnamese […]...
Keep on reading: What BGYO’s Gelo, Vu Thao My learned from each other after fiery collab

world.title: Pop star Shakira is acquitted in a Spanish tax fraud case
world.description: The decision follows years of tax troubles in Spain for the Colombian superstar. Spanish tax authorities did not prove that the singer was a resident of Spain, the court said in its decision.

energy.title: Russia Quietly Adds Four LNG Carriers to Its Arctic Dark Fleet
energy.description: Russia appears to have recently added four LNG carriers to its growing dark fleet of tankers exporting cargoes from the sanctioned Arctic LNG 2 project, a Bloomberg analysis of shipping data showed on Monday. Four LNG carriers, Kosmos, Merkuriy, Orion, and Luch have recently changed their ownership and management to little known companies. They were previously servicing Oman’s LNG exports and were managed or owned by Oman Ship Management Co, according to Bloomberg’s findings. The Kosmos has recently docked at a floating storage unit…

energy.title: Anglo American Exits Steelmaking Coal With $3.9 Billion Australian Asset Sale
energy.description: Anglo American has agreed to sell its steelmaking coal assets in Australia to Dhilmar Limited for up to $3.875 billion in cash, exiting the steelmaking coal business as the mining giant continues its restructuring that began two years ago. Anglo American said in May 2024 that it plans to divest or demerge its diamond, platinum, steelmaking coal, and nickel businesses as it seeks to radically simplify its portfolio to focus on its copper, premium iron ore, and crop nutrients assets. Today, Anglo American announced that it had agreed to sell its…

usStocks.title: Greg Abel Channeled His Inner Warren Buffett With Legacy and Dividend Stock Buys in Q1
usStocks.description: Warren Buffett stepped down as CEO of Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRK-B) on December 31, 2025, after six decades leading the conglomerate he transformed from a struggling textile mill into a $1 trillion empire. The “Oracle of Omaha” left his successor, Greg Abel, with a highly concentrated portfolio: almost 65% of Berkshire’s $331 billion equity portfolio ... Greg Abel Channeled His Inner Warren Buffett With Legacy and Dividend Stock Buys in Q1
usStocks.source: Yahoo! Finance: AAPL MSFT GOOGL AMZA NVDA News

usStocks.title: Prediction: Wall Street May Be Sleeping on Google’s Next Big Move
usStocks.description: Few mega-caps have shifted the narrative as decisively as Google (NASDAQ:GOOG) has over the past year. After a 138.92% one-year run and a 26.65% year-to-date gain, the real question is whether the market has fully priced what comes next. Our model says it has not. Our 24/7 Wall St. Price Target for Google Google trades ... Prediction: Wall Street May Be Sleeping on Google’s Next Big Move

entertainment.description: “The Red Hangar” (“Hangar rojo”), Chilean Juan Pablo Sallato’s black & white fiction feature debut, which swept the Guadalajara Film Festival in April, has sold to U.S.-based company Pragda, marking its first all-rights acquisition for the U.S. and Canada. entertainment.title: Jia Zhangke Sets Next Feature ‘Mamma Dunhuang’ Starring Zhao Tao and Liao Fan, Reteaming With MK2 Films (EXCLUSIVE)
entertainment.description: Celebrated Chinese filmmaker Jia Zhangke will next direct “Mamma Dunhuang,” reteaming with French production and sales banner MK2 Films. The latter, spearheaded by Nathanael and Elisha Karmitz, co-produces “Mamma Dunhuang,” in partnership with the director’s Chinese production company Xstream Pictures. It will begin shooting this winter. “Mamma Dunhuang” tells the story of a mother who has […]

entertainment.description: “I will make a sequel when possible,” said Korean director Na Hong-Jin at this afternoon’s Cannes press conference for the film. The sci-fi action movie made its world premiere last night at the fest to a seven-minute standing ovation. While the three protagonists are played by Korean actors, the family of extraterrestrial bad guys are […]
